description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a dark, multi-gabled roof and a sleek, minimalist facade. The exterior features large glass windows, particularly at the front, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is accompanied by a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by two tall, slender trees that add greenery and vertical interest. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements accentuating the design. The front entryway is defined by a small porch area and a set of steps, providing a welcoming transition from the walkway. The overall layout is compact yet spacious, with clean lines and a focus on functional, modern living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark gabled roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist facade, set alongside a paved walkway and two tall trees.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, paved walkway, and two tall trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dark roof and the back of the house, with the trees and walkway visible behind.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, window placements, and the trees adjacent to the walkway.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the entryway, porch, and the symmetrical arrangement of the trees and walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and minimalist overhang, flanked by tall trees and a paved walkway.
